linkedin_data.about:
20年に渡るライフサイエンス業界での経験 と 10年以上のIVD（診断薬）業界での経験を生かして、LC-MS（液体クロマトグラフィーと質量分析）による分析技術を医療（遺伝子治療・細胞治療）や診断などより幅広い分野に広めることをライフワークとしています。
また、8年間海外で仕事をした経験を生かして、グローバルに活躍できる若手人材の育成にも努めて、グローバル企業での日本人の存在感を高めたいと考えています。… more

posts.content: Thanks to the Waters Corporation team’s focus on innovation and operational excellence, our strong momentum continued in Q3. Our third quarter sales grew 8%, driven by robust adoption of category defining innovation, including the launch of the Xevo Charge Detection Mass Spectrometer (CDMS). The Xevo CDMS is a truly groundbreaking instrument that opens new doors for scientists exploring mega mass biomolecules that were previously out of reach. Our chemistry portfolio continues to set the standard in the industry, with excellent customer reception of our new SEC and Affinity bioseparation columns. The products we have launched over the past five years grew approximately 50% in the quarter and have been a key contributor to our 11% year-to-date chemistry growth. It is fantastic to see the impact of our revitalized portfolio. Integration planning with BD Biosciences and Diagnostic Solutions is progressing very well. We remain on track to close around the end of the first quarter calendar year 2026. Exciting times ahead! …more
当社（Waters社）がWyatt社の買収を発表しました。 これにより、当社が所有していた様々な検出技術に新たに「光散乱法」による検出技術が加わることとなり、より幅広い物質の検出・同定・定量が可能になります。特に、ペプチド・核酸・抗体などの中高分子の分析がより強化できますので、益々バイオ・ファーマ研究のお役に立てると感じております。 https://lnkd.in/grGgYQQW …more

In addition to announcing outstanding 4Q22 and FY22 earnings results today, I am excited to share important news for Waters Corporation. Today, we announced our intent to acquire Waters | Wyatt Technology, a pioneer and recognized leader in innovative laser light scattering technology. Over the past two years, Waters has regained its commercial momentum, revitalized innovation, and put an outstanding leadership team in place. This acquisition marks the next phase of our strategy for growth. Together, we will give our customers an unmatched set of analytical solutions for large molecule characterization, including cell and gene therapies. We share a deeply scientific culture and common passion for customer success, which will accelerate integration and drive value creation for our customers and shareholders in the years to come. For more than 40 years, Wyatt has been defining and redefining state-of-the-art light scattering instrumentation, software, and services to solve their customers’ unmet needs. Waters will broaden Wyatt’s global reach and scale, and Wyatt will enable Waters to meaningfully accelerate our position in the bioanalytical characterization market. I’m excited about all we will achieve together and look forward to welcoming Wyatt’s talented employees to our team. Learn more about the Wyatt acquisition at https://lnkd.in/ehkNxN5g and our earnings at https://lnkd.in/e2CXuSJQ. …more

Today, Waters announced our financial results for the third quarter of 2022 which demonstrate continued commercial momentum with strong growth across our end-markets and geographies. Click to learn more: https://bit.ly/3SVxxdg hashtag #Earnings hashtag #WatersInnovation …more
